---
#title: "Samantha Csik"
image: sam.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/samanthacsik/
      target: _blank
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/samanthacsik
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:scsik@ucsb.edu   
---

Hi there! I’m Sam (and my last name is pronounced “chick”). Professionally, I love teaching data science skills, learning and implementing inclusive pedagogical approaches, and the communities that support both of those things. Outside of work, I’m an avid hiker, novice (but passionate) meal-maker, and I really love the color green. Poke around to learn more about me and my work!

## Education

some text here

## Professional Experience

More text here
